_publications._publicationTitle: MicroRNA profiling of peripheral nerve sheath tumours identifies miR-29c as a tumour suppressor gene involved in tumour progression.

_contextSnippet: Sixteen miRNA were significantly differentially expressed in MPNST compared with neurofibromas...with a false discovery rate of q=8.48E-03 for the least significant miRNA.
details: Successfully identified 16 significantly differentially expressed miRNAs between MPNST and neurofibromas with false discovery rate q=8.48E-03
